title: wedelia jacquinii var. calycina
intro: Wedelia jacquinii var. calycina is a variant of the Wedelia jacquinii plant, also known as the Mexican mint or yellow flower, which belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Wedelia jacquinii var. calycina include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
